mapper.select: select r.id, r.reporter_id as reporter_id, m.nickname as reporter_nickname, r.target_type as target_type, r.target_id as target_id, r.reason, r.detail, r.status, r.resolved_at as resolved_at, r.created_datetime as created_datetime, r.resolved_memo as resolved_memo, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select w.title from tbl_work w where w.id = r.target_id ) when r.target_type = 'MEMBER' then ( select m2.nickname from tbl_member m2 where m2.id = r.target_id ) else 'unknown' end as target_name, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select w2.status from tbl_work w2 where w2.id = r.target_id ) when r.target_type = 'MEMBER' then ( select m3.status from tbl_member m3 where m3.id = r.target_id ) else null end as target_status, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select tm.nickname from tbl_work w3 join tbl_member tm on w3.member_id = tm.id where w3.id = r.target_id ) else null end as target_author_name, case when r.target_type = 'WORK' then ( select tm2.status from tbl_work w4 join tbl_member tm2 on w4.member_id = tm2.id where w4.id = r.target_id ) else null end as target_author_status, ( select count(*) from tbl_report r3 where r3.reporter_id = r.reporter_id ) as reporter_history_count from tbl_report r join tbl_member m on r.reporter_id = m.id where r.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update tbl_report set status = #{status}, resolved_memo = #{memo}, resolved_at = case when #{status} = 'RESOLVED' then now() else resolved_at end, updated_datetime = now() where id = #{id}
